Hello {{first_name}},

It's Adele here from LuxFitting. I hope you're staying cozy this February!

You know what makes my heart full? When I read letters like the one from Patricia (75) in Michigan. After her arthritis diagnosis, she thought gardening was over - until she tried our StretchActive pants. Now she's back to 3-hour gardening sessions! That's exactly why we do what we do.

If you’re anything like my mom (she’s 72 and loves her daily walks), you know how hard it can be to find clothes that are gentle on the knees, cozy enough for all-day wear, and still look lovely—without spending a fortune.

This Valentine's, I want to spread more stories like Patricia's. For the next 48 hours, we're offering our most-loved pants at just $16.99 (originally $89.99-$100.99):

• StretchActive Pants - Perfect for gardening and daily activities
• EaseFlexor Pants - Ideal for walks with family (Margaret and her daughter love their matching pairs!)
• Plus a Mystery Item (exclusive for our email friends like you!)

COOLMAX® and ice silk fabrics regulate body temperature and wick moisture instantly — especially meaningful during hot flashes, which affect over 75% of women in menopause.
360° stretch fabric doesn't compress leg veins — supporting better circulation all day, which matters more as we get older and spend more time on our feet.

A few things I've picked up that might surprise you:
🌞 Adele's Summer Comfort Tips
👖Wide-leg beats shorts for staying cool. Wide cuts create a natural airflow channel around your legs — something tight or fitted just can't do. Doctors often recommend loose-fit styles for women managing circulation issues or ankle swelling.
🧊Ice silk actually pulls heat from your skin. Unlike cotton, which holds moisture, ice silk wicks it away and accelerates cooling — a meaningful difference if you experience hot flashes or overheat easily.
💧Hydrate before you feel thirsty. By the time thirst kicks in, you're already mildly dehydrated. A glass of water with every outfit change is an easy habit that keeps energy up all day.
🌈 Light colours reflect heat — and lift your mood. Studies show wearing lighter tones in summer reduces perceived body temperature. And feeling good in what you wear? That part is free.

Oops {{first_name}}! Got nothing to wear? 😒
Ta-da! ✨ We've got solution inside ✨

Good day, {{first_name}}! 

Have you ever found yourself in front of the mirror, thinking there is nothing to wear? A capsule wardrobe is the answer! It’s easier and cheaper than you’d ever imagined.

A summer capsule wardrobe is a carefully curated selection of classic pieces you can easily mix and match to create many stylish outfits.

Below are 4 simple steps to build the summer capsule wardrobe of your dream.

1. Embrace lightweight materials and comfy fits  
The three best materials for summer are cotton, linen, and light denim. Also, make sure to pick items that you feel comfortable in and are flattering for your body type.

2. Stick to a color palette
Neutral colors such as white, black, gray, cream, brown, and taupe are versatile and most effortless to style. Then stay consistent with the chosen color palette.

3. Invest in high-quality essential basics
Think of classic items like well-fitting jeans, a tailored blazer, versatile tops, skirts or trousers, and a little black dress. These pieces form the foundation of your wardrobe and can match with accessories.

4. Add Fun and Vibrant Accessories
Details make the outfit! Make it pop with a colorful bag, sunglasses, wide-brimmed hats, and playful jewelry.

I hope with these easy tips, you'll be well on your way to build a casual summer capsule wardrobe that is comfortable, versatile, and effortlessly chic. Stay tuned for more tips!  

Cheers,
Adele

PS: Head to Luxfitting's website to explore essential items for your summer capsule wardrobe
with 0 shipping charge at checkout!

Hola {{first_name}}!

We're thrilled to share a sizzling news with you. We’ve recently had the pleasure of sitting down with Jessica Ann - a lifestyle and fashion blogger for a brief interview about summer styles. Take a look at her practical sharing that you can follow right away to elevate your outfit.

❓ What are your favorite everyday dresses for summer?
Definitely chic maxi dresses. Whether it's a vibrant floral print, a bohemian design, or a simple solid color, maxi dresses give us versatile styling options.

❓ What are the should-go-for fabrics for summer clothing?
I’m about anything that’s in a breezy, lightweight fabric and isn’t clingy. I suggest choosing materials like cotton, linen, or chambray that help keep us cool.

Let's embrace the irresistible allure of jumpsuits. One of my top-loved is this JumpChic. The sleeveless design is ideal for summer or for layering with your favorite jacket or sweater.

We hope you’ve got more inspiration for a stylish summer wardrobe. Stay tuned for upcoming surprises from Luxfitting!

Hi {{first_name}},

It's Adele. As summer winds down and we find ourselves in the warmth of late August, I can't help but think about all the birthdays we get to celebrate together. Whether you’ve just recently shopped with us or it’s been a while since we last connected, I wanted to send you a little something to make your special day even brighter.

You know, there's something special about birthdays at our age. They're not just about cake and candles anymore (though I still love both!). They're a chance to reflect on the beautiful life we've lived and the adventures still to come.

Speaking of which, my granddaughter visited last week. She pointed out that my favorite cardigan was looking a bit worn. It got me thinking – maybe it's time we treat ourselves to something new and lovely. After all, we deserve to feel fabulous every day, don't we?

That's why I've arranged a special birthday treat for you. We're offering a 50% discount storewide on all our comfortable, stylish clothes. Perfect for afternoon teas, gardening, or those precious moments with the grandkids.

And because you're part of our email family, I've set aside some exclusive items just for you. These are restocked favorites that you won't find anywhere else.

Maybe you’ll find that perfect cozy sweater for the cooler days ahead, or perhaps you’ll rediscover an old favorite you’ve been meaning to get your hands on again. Whatever you choose, I hope it brings you as much joy as I feel knowing you’ll be celebrating in style.

Wishing you a wonderful day filled with love, laughter, and perhaps a new outfit or two.

Warmest regards,
Adele

P.S. Remember, dear, this offer is our little secret – just for our email subscribers. It's my way of saying thank you for being part of our community.

Hello {{first_name}},

I hope this message finds you well and enjoying these late summer days. You know, I was thinking about you the other day while I was tending to my garden. As I was bending down to plant some new marigolds, I realized how grateful I was for my FlexiPants. No tugging, no discomfort – just easy movement.

It got me wondering: how are you doing with your daily activities? Are you able to move freely when you're playing with the grandkids or working on your hobbies? I remember my mother struggling with stiff, uncomfortable pants as she aged, and it always broke my heart to see her limited by her clothing.

That's why I'm reaching out today. We've expanded our collection with some wonderful pieces – all designed with the same comfort and stretch you've come to love. Whether you're running errands, meeting friends for coffee, or just relaxing at home, these pants move with you, not against you.

You’ve always been part of our family here, and we’ve designed this collection with women like you in mind—styles that make you feel free and confident, without sacrificing comfort. Right now, we’re offering 50% OFF, because I truly believe you deserve to treat yourself to something that makes every day a little easier.

Take a peek at our new collection—I'm sure you’ll find something you'll love as much as your favorite FlexiPants. Plus, who can say no to 50% OFF?

Looking forward to hearing what you think. Let’s make your wardrobe just as effortless as you are.

Take care and stay comfortable,

Adele

Dearest {{first_name}},
April always feels like a quiet reset—longer days, gentler mornings, and weekends that invite us to slow down a little. Whether or not April is your birthday, I truly believe this month is worth celebrating you.
As the beautiful April weather rolls in, I was just thinking about how many of us struggle to actually enjoy these spring weekends. It’s hard to feel like celebrating when your joints are aching, your legs are swelling, and stiff waistbands are digging into your skin.
Before we get into anything else, here is a quick tip I recently shared with my own mother for these unpredictable spring days: Start your morning with a glass of warm lemon water to naturally reduce joint inflammation, and always dress in breathable, stretchable layers. This simple trick keeps your circulation flowing and stops those unexpected hot flashes before they ruin your afternoon.
You deserve to look completely elegant, receive lovely compliments from your family, and feel totally pain-free—without spending a fortune.
Many of our customers tell me the same thing lately:
“Prices everywhere are up, but I still want to feel comfortable and put together.”
You’re not alone. That’s exactly why we created our Birthday April Weekend Sale—simple, fair, and stress‑free.
No code. No exclusions. No limits.
Just honest savings, storewide. And free shipping on orders over $40.
Whether you are celebrating an April birthday or just treating yourself to a much-needed wardrobe refresh, I am throwing a massive Weekend Sale to celebrate you. Over 50,000 women have already reclaimed their mobility with our designs, and I want you to feel that same relief.
Adele's April weekend ideas
Treat yourself to something you normally save for others. A new pair of pants you've been eyeing, a long bath in the middle of the day, a favorite meal. April is a good excuse to start.
Research shows that what we wear directly affects how much we move. Restrictive clothes quietly limit us — comfortable ones quietly free us. If your legs feel easier in softer pants, you'll walk more. And that matters.
If you have an April birthday, plan something simple but intentional — a morning walk in your favorite outfit, lunch somewhere that makes you feel like royalty, a phone call with someone who always makes you laugh.
And if April isn't your birth month? Celebrate anyway. The women who tend to feel the best aren't waiting for permission. Give yourself this one weekend. You've more than earned it.
Everything is marked down storewide. No codes needed, and absolutely no exclusions. I’ve temporarily dropped the prices on our three most life-changing pieces by over 80% so you can experience true comfort without the financial stress:
Women in our community tell us these pieces help with what matters most:
softer fabrics for sensitive skin
gentle stretch for knees, hips, and long days
breathable materials that stay cool and dry
waistbands that don’t pinch or press
At these prices, our warehouse shelves are emptying incredibly fast. 98% of our spring inventory is already claimed, and I genuinely don't want you to miss out on these savings.
As a little extra birthday gift from me, you'll get Free Shipping on any order over $40.
Our sizing goes from XS all the way to 5X, with petite, regular, and tall inseams — because every shape deserves something that actually fits. And every woman reading this deserves to stop settling for "close enough."
Prices like these don't come around often. The sale runs through Sunday, and a few of these are already moving fast. If something catches your eye today, I'd hate for you to come back tomorrow and find it's gone.
With all my warmth,
Adele
